name: premium
description: Clinical elegance with white marble surfaces, precision arrangement, and the refined luxury of high-end wellness. This mood elevates supplements beyond commodities into premium health investments — clean, trustworthy, and beautifully presented.

style.lighting: clean bright studio | soft even diffusion | minimal shadow precision
style.color_grade: clean white and green | gold accent highlights | clinical warmth balance
style.camera: precise product hero | macro ingredient detail | clean overhead arrangement
style.composition: centered product with premium space | ingredient deconstruction | white space emphasis
style.props: white marble surface, gold accent elements, single botanical sprig, premium glass bottle, precision dropper

copy_tone: Premium and precise. Every ingredient listed is intentional. Uses language of investment and quality — 'pharmaceutical-grade,' 'third-party tested,' 'precision-formulated.' Trust built through transparency.

music.mood: clean minimal electronic, luxury spa ambient, precision soundscape

example_prompt_fragment: A premium supplement product shot on white marble surface, GAIA Supplements bottle in deep green glass with gold cap, precisely placed botanical ingredients deconstructed around it — turmeric root, moringa leaves, ashwagandha — clean bright studio lighting with minimal shadows, white and green color palette with gold accents, luxury clinical wellness photography
